title: Rommel PVP (Vanilla)
description: Get very Vanilla PVP Gameplay with this texturepack!
body:
A Vanilla PVP Texture pack, to help people see better while fighting.
All Changes:

• Smaller Totem Pop                               
• Lower Shield                               
• No Explosion Particles                               
• No Totem Pop Particles                               
• A slightly smaller totem                               

Otherwise, everything else remains vanilla—all other items, and everything else you typically need for PvP.
This is an excellent Crystal PvP texture pack for practicing or playing on the FoxPVP.de server.
It is also useful for improving visibility during tier tests.

This texture pack is also used by players such as RommelRPG, DanaRPG, Bonzy3390, and MaxMelonie44.

**Screenshots: (most important)**
